ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (F or M) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Residential neighborhood of the patient */,
  "scholarship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on scholarship */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has hypertension */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has diabetes */,
  "alcoholism" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a history of alcoholism */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a handicap */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_diabetes FOREIGN KEY ("diabetes") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_hypertension FOREIGN KEY ("hypertension") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_neighbourhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_scholarship FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "scheduled_day" TEXT /* Date and time when the appointment was scheduled */,
  "appointment_day" TEXT /* Date and time of the actual appointment */,
  "sms_received" INTEGER /* Indicates if an SMS reminder was sent */,
  "no_show" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient did not show up for the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (scheduled, confirmed, cancelled, completed) */,
  "provider_id" TEXT /* Reference to the provider associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (consultation, follow-up, surgery) */,
  "appointment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition (e.g., Hypertension, Diabetes) */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the medical condition (e.g., cardiovascular, respiratory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcoholism_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcoholism history record */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient associated with the record */,
  "alcoholism_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a history of alcoholism */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient's treatment for alcoholism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcoholism_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "handicap_status" (
  "handicap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handicap status record */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient associated with the record */,
  "handicap_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a handicap */,
  "disability_type" TEXT /* Type of disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handicap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_handicap_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sms_logs" (
  "sms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMS log entry */,
  "appointment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the appointment associated with the SMS */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the SMS was sent */,
  "sms_status" TEXT /* Status of the SMS (sent, delivered, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sms_logs_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Contact details of the provider (email, phone number, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointment_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "appointment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the appointment associated with the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (SMS, email, voice call) */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (sent, delivered, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_reminders_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Reference to the patient associated with the engagement record */,
  "appointment_id" TEXT /* Reference to the appointment associated with the engagement record */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (appointment attendance, cancellation, no-show) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagements_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagements_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
